_comment: Expected dependency tree for poetry_calendar_version_whl — regression for SCA-5540. pdfminer.six 20251230 is a calendar-versioned package (no dots in version segment). After the fix, it must appear as a fully-populated transitive dependency under pdfplumber.

transitiveDependencies.name: pdfminer-six
transitiveDependencies._note: Calendar version — the regression target. Must have sha1/systemPath/filename/dependencyFile populated after SCA-5540 fix.
